creator: mrT1188123@gmail.com
text:
To reproduce:
   from:   https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/ports.cgi?query=audio&stype=all
   click on:  Category audio
              (https://www.freebsd.org/ports/audio.html)
      Or on any other Category
What opens is a page that reads:
          
Page not found.
Oh no. :(

We could not find the page you requested.

Please try your request again, use one of the links in the navigation menu, or the search box at the top of the page.

--------

About two or three months ago I use to get an complete index of a specified
Category ports.
It appears that all Categories are responding this way.
